name: 互联网初识
subject: inquiry
domain_name: 交通与通信 / Transport & Communication / Transport & Communication
curriculum_points: Students will be able to explain, in simple terms, how the internet functions as a network for finding and sharing information. (Age 7-9)
Students will be able to demonstrate digital citizenship by applying safe, ethical, and responsible practices when using online resources and communication tools. (Age 9-11)
